---
name: Ontology Candidate
about: Submit an ontology for inclusion in the ENERO Foundry
title: "Add <my ontology> to ENERO Foundry"
labels: ["status: active 🚧", "part: community 🌍", "other: help wanted 🙋"]
assignees: ""
---

## Ontology Overview

**Ontology Name:** 
**Abbreviation:** 
**Homepage:** 
**Primary Repository:** 
**Main Contact / Maintainer:** 

## Scope and Purpose

Provide a concise abstract describing the ontology’s purpose, domain coverage, 
and intended users. Highlight how it is related to the energy domain.

## Additional Information (Optional)

**License:** 
**Current Version / Release:** 
**Governance Model:** 
**Related Ontologies or Dependencies:** 
**Existing Users or Implementations:** 

## Legend

| Symbol | Status |
|--------|--------|
| 🟢 | Compliant |
| 🟡 | Partially compliant |
| 🔴 | Non-compliant |
| ⚫ | Not applicable / cannot assess |

## Principle Checklist

- [ ] ⚫ **P1 [Openness](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/1_open/)**
  **License:** [e.g. CC0-1.0, CC-BY-4.0, MIT]
  [URL to licence file]
  **License annotation property:**
  [URL to line in source file]

- [ ] ⚫ **P2 [Common Format](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/2_format/)**
  [Serialisation format(s) available, e.g. OWL/Manchester, Turtle, RDF/XML, JSON-LD]
  [URL to ontology file or release]

- [ ] ⚫ **P3 [Release and Versioning](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/3_release_versioning.md/)**
  [owl:versionInfo present: yes / no]
  [owl:versionIRI present: yes / no]
  [Changelog / release notes URL]
  [URL to releases]

- [ ] ⚫ **P4 [Documentation](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/9_documentation/)**
  [Documentation available: README / Wiki / published docs / CONTRIBUTING / CITATION]
  [URL]

- [ ] ⚫ **P5 [Collaboration and Responsiveness](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/10_collaboration/)**
  [Open contribution model: yes / no]
  [Community channels: GitHub Issues, Discussions, mailing list, meetings]
  [CONTRIBUTING.md / CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md present: yes / no]
  [URL]

- [ ] ⚫ **P6 [Scope](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/6_scope/)**
  [Scope statement location: README / documentation / ontology annotation]
  [URL]

- [ ] ⚫ **P7 [Foundational Ontology](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/3_bfo/)**
  [BFO used: yes / no / partial]
  [Evidence: import statement, wiki, README]
  [URL]

- [ ] ⚫ **P8 [Identifier and Naming Conventions](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/7_naming/)**
  [IRI pattern, e.g. numeric ID, camelCase label-based]
  [URL to naming convention documentation]

- [ ] ⚫ **P9 [Textual Definitions](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/8_definitions/)**
  [Annotation property used, e.g. IAO:0000115 or rdfs:comment]
  [Coverage: all classes / all properties / classes only]
  [URL to tests or source]

- [ ] ⚫ **P10 [Usage of AI](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/11_ai_usage/)**
  [AI usage disclosed: yes / no / not applicable]
  [Location of disclosure if yes]

## Workflow checklist

- [ ] I am aware of the workflow in [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/ENEROFoundry/ENEROFoundry/blob/production/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I am aware of ENERO Foundry [principles](https://enerofoundry.github.io/ENEROFoundry/principles/)
